calendar.matters:
Mtn For Order Vacating And Setting Aside Default
Off Calendar Jul-09-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - GURPREET SINGH, TEL. NO. (510) 388-5254 PLAINTIFF APPEARING IN PRO PER;
ATTY. HARRY T. GOWER, III, DEPUTY ATTORNEY GENERAL, TEL. NO. 703-5500 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF GURPREET SINGH'S Motion For Order Vacating And Setting Aside Default is Off calendar as untimely under CCP 1005(b). The motion was served on June 23, 2014. Moving party only provided 8 court days notice. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-13-2014 Off Calendar

Mtn For Order Vacating And Setting Aside Default
Off Calendar Jun-27-2014 Continued To Jul-09-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF GURPREET SINGH'S Motion For Order Vacating And Setting Aside Default is continued to July 9, 2014 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than June 27, 2014 at 4:00 p.m. or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order Vacating And Setting Aside Default (And Default Judgment)
Off Calendar May-21-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF GURPREET SINGH's Motion For Order Vacating And Setting Aside Default (And Default Judgment) is off calendar. Defendant Gurpreet Singh did not timely file proof of service for the motion. (Cal. Rules of Court, rule 3.1300(c).) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-03-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT BOARD OF TRUSTEES OF THE CALIFORNIA STATE UNIVERSITY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend. (CCP sec. 430.10(e).) No opposition filed. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
